feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to subscribe to SuccessFactors Employee Central via Test, Demo and Development environment
entry.content:
Hi All,

Myself Abdullah Shaik, working for Invenics Services Ltd and there is a POC requirement came to us which is below:

Requirement: Extract the data from SF Employee Central using SAP Datasphere and load it into SAP HANA and generate the reports.

As part of the requirement, we have subscribed to SAP Datasphere using TDD (Test, Demo and Development environment subscription). However, I am not finding the right place to use the same TDD for SuccessFactors. Could you please help with the below queries along with the subscription process to SF EC?

a) How to subscribe to SF Employee Central?

b) As part of the subscription, do we get the Technical user of SF Employee Central?

c) Is there any data already available in the subscription system or do we need to load the data? If so, do we have the right admin access to load the data?

d) Assume that the subscription is done, is SAP going to charge message based triggers or do we have some xxx number of messages free? 

e) Any restriction on the messages processed between the applications/systems?

Best regards,

Abdullah Shaik.

entry.title: How to generate DMEE Source format CGI_CT_V9 for Italy
entry.content:
As per note 2784858 to update DMEE tree, I am trying to upload the XML file PAYM_IT_CBI_XML_CT_00_04_01.xml

But I am receiving below error 

Here we tried to create source format CGI_CT_V9 by copying CGI_XML_CT format but still its not working and getting the sane error.

Some resolution on the topic is much appreciated.

entry.title: Handling Units not assigned in inspection lot
entry.content:
Hi,

A company with multiple branches across different countries uses SAP. One branch of the company conducted a shipment to another branch in a different country by sending goods in specific quantities, with each pallet containing a handling unit, using an outbound delivery to transfer the goods to the receiving branch.

Upon receiving these goods, the receiving branch processed a goods receipt for the inbound delivery. However, they deleted the handling units sent by the other branch, which then went to storage location 9000. The receiving branch (Branch B) then created new handling units, but these new units do not appear in the sampling report and also do not show up in the inspection lot.

entry.title: Descuentos por pronto pago Inactiva
entry.content:
Hola,

En nuestra empresa hemos acordado aplicar descuentos por pronto pago a proveedores para compras recurrentes. Al intentar configurar estas condiciones de pago y parametrizar los descuentos, nos dimos cuenta de que la opción no está disponible en el sistema.

Nos comunicamos con nuestro partner y nos informaron que esta funcionalidad está disponible solo para regiones específicas. Sin embargo, nos mencionaron que si deseamos implementar esta opción, sería necesario desarrollar una solución personalizada.

Mi duda es si realmente es necesario este desarrollo, ya que al revisar la base de datos, encontramos que sí tenemos acceso a la tabla correspondiente

Adjunto una imagen de referencia para que puedan tener una mejor idea de lo que estamos viendo.

Hola,

En nuestra empresa hemos acordado aplicar descuentos por pronto pago a proveedores para compras recurrentes. Al intentar configurar estas condiciones de pago y parametrizar los descuentos, nos dimos cuenta de que la opción no está disponible en el sistema.

Nos comunicamos con nuestro partner y nos informaron que esta funcionalidad está disponible solo para regiones específicas. Sin embargo, nos mencionaron que si deseamos implementar esta opción, sería necesario desarrollar una solución personalizada.

Mi duda es si realmente es necesario este desarrollo, ya que al revisar la base de datos, encontramos que sí tenemos acceso a la tabla correspondiente

Adjunto una imagen de referencia para que puedan tener una mejor idea de lo que estamos viendo.

Imagen con la opción activada

   Imagen con la opción desactivada

Agradezco cualquier ayuda o sugerencia sobre cómo proceder.

entry.title: when looking at Iowa 2024 W-4 form, the 2024 form states the allowances will need to be a dollar val
entry.content: The Iowa 2024 W-4 form,  the allowances will need to be a dollar value instead of an integer. When populating the ESS W-4 screen for Iowa, it is still expressed as an integer and same thing with the PA30 IT0210 screen. If there is an workaround how to resolve it?

entry.title: Advance Payment Ariba
entry.content: Hello everyone, I would like to ask if advance payments are available with Arriba through s4hana public Cloud.

entry.title: invoice save as completed coming from Ariba
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to know if we have any integration or tools for invoices coming from Arias. I want them to be saved as complete, not as parked.

Can you help me with this?

entry.title: sap analytics cloud
entry.content: Is there any way to do joins of table in modeler in sac?

entry.title: Exceed Budget in posting MIRO Invoice for PR, PO in WBS
entry.content:
Hello guys, I have a problem like this:

1. I created project, WBS level 1 level 2, Network, Activity (internal) and Material Component.

2. I released project and assign budget for the project in cj30, and cj32.

3. I used the PR created in the Material Component to create PO and it charged commitment budget to my WBS and network activity.

4. I post goods receipt and then go to MIRO t-code.

5. I posted invoice for the PO that created from the PR of the material component and the system raise the error: In document item 003 Ntwk actvty 310000057 0010, budget for WBS element O.999987 for fiscal year 2024 was exceeded by 200.000.000 VND.

Although I have budgeted and released the budget for the WBS, there were 200.000.000 VND in the commitment and the MIRO didn't take it and raise the error: Budget Exceed.

Please help me with this problem.

entry.title: SAP FICO Certification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am preparing for FICO certification doing practice and i need guidance how to apply for exam and any book suggestion for SAP FICO.

also kindly suggest how to move to SAP FICO Team am part of financial team for 12 years

 

Regards,

Sairam.N

entry.title: Best practices using SAP_ALL for implementations
entry.content:
Hi there, 

I am currently leading the end-to-end implementation of the embedded EWM module. As we approach the cutover phase in the client’s production environment, I have requested broad access permissions to perform certain client-specific technical activities. These activities often involve complex object configurations that do not follow the typical transport order process. Given these requirements, I believe it is necessary to have a temporary, consultant-level user role with SAP_ALL access. However, the client has raised concerns about audit compliance and is hesitant to grant this access.

Is there any official documentation or best practice guideline available that supports the need for extended permissions during critical implementation phases? This would help the client understand the necessity of SAP_ALL for certain technical tasks during cutover and allow us to proceed effectively

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP AATP
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am working on aATP SUP ( Supply protection)  in my current project and I need some examples of AATP SUP over protection drawback and other limitation if it has.

Similarly, please suggest which SUP is better to use in retail industry - Vertical protection or horizontal protection??

Thanks in Advance

Regards

Rinku

entry.title: How to synch data from PA30/PA20 actions of user group to SU01 of BASIS Tcode
entry.content:
I am writing to request your assistance in synchronizing user transfer and resignation data between the Personnel Administration (PA20/PA30) and User Management (SU01) transactions within our SAP system. This synchronization will help us streamline the process of distinguishing and managing SAP users based on their respective organizational sites and departments.

Currently, as part of our user management process, we rely on data maintained in PA20/PA30 to track employee transfers, resignations, and other HR-related changes. However, this information does not automatically reflect in SU01, which is crucial for managing SAP access and ensuring that users are properly aligned with their current roles, locations, and organizational structures.

entry.title: SAC
entry.content: Hello all , is there any ways to change the join type in model that i have created using classical model type and i have joined two tables using one condition now i want to change that !

entry.title: Issue in updating inspection lot characteristics after UD Made
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to update inspection lot characteristics using ABAP logic after Usage Decision has made.

I have tried with the BAPI(BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS) for the Result recording this BAPI is throwing the below error

Can anyone please help me with the process to achieve this scenario.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Instead of monthly the company would like to move SAP into a 5-4-4 calender 2025.
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are currently following calender year, Instead of monthly the company would like to move SAP into a 5-4-4 calender 2025.

Could you please healp me here, how to define the periods under the respective variant.

Regards,

Jayasurya.

entry.title: Excel file generated via xco_cp_xlsx is not opening when sent over Email
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am trying to generate a excel with the help of xco_cp_xlsx and attached to email. But when trying the access the attachment in Email getting the below error and unable to open the excel.

 

Code Snippet:

TRY.

DATA(lo_write_access) = xco_cp_xlsx=>document->empty( )->write_access( ).

DATA(lo_worksheet) = lo_write_access->get_workbook( )->worksheet->at_position( 1 ).

DATA(lo_cursor) = lo_worksheet->cursor(
io_column = xco_cp_xlsx=>coordinate->for_alphabetic_value( 'A' )
io_row = xco_cp_xlsx=>coordinate->for_numeric_value( 1 )
).

lo_cursor->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'PO Number' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'PO Item' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Material' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Net Price' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Qty Requested' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Percent Complete' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Gross Amount' ).
lo_cursor->move_right( )->get_cell( )->value->write_from( 'Amount to Accrue' ).


DATA(lo_selection_pattern) = xco_cp_xlsx_selection=>pattern_builder->simple_from_to(
)->from_column( xco_cp_xlsx=>coordinate->for_alphabetic_value( 'A' )
)->from_row( xco_cp_xlsx=>coordinate->for_numeric_value( 2 )
)->get_pattern( ).

lo_worksheet->select( lo_selection_pattern
)->row_stream(
)->operation->write_from( REF #( lt_purchase_orders )
)->set_value_transformation( xco_cp_xlsx_write_access=>value_transformation->best_effort
)->execute( ).

DATA(lv_file_content) = lo_write_access->get_file_content( ).

lv_email_subject = 'Accrual Report for PO Items to be Posted for Current Month'.

DATA(lv_sender_email) = 'dummy@email.com'.
lv_recipient = 'dummy@email.com'.

DATA(lo_mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).


lo_mail->set_sender( CONV #( lv_sender_email ) ).
lo_mail->add_recipient( CONV #( lv_recipient ) ).
lo_mail->set_subject( CONV #( lv_email_subject ) ).

DATA(lv_content) = |<h1 style="font-family:Helvetica;color:#000000;">Posting Data for the current Month</h1>| &
|<p style="font-family:Helvetica;font-size:14px;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;color:#000000;">Dear Team,<br/><br/>| &
|Please check the attached file for the Purchase Order to be posting in the current month.

lo_mail->set_main( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
iv_content = lv_content
iv_content_type = 'text/html'
) ).


lo_mail->add_attachment( cl_bcs_mail_binarypart=>create_instance(
iv_content = lv_file_content
iv_content_type = 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'
iv_filename = 'Posting Document.xlsx'
) ).
lo_mail->send( ).

This I am trying to achieve in S/4 HANA 2023. Please let me know if you have any pointer to resolve this issue.

Regards,

Guru

entry.title: In a sales order, is it not possible, to delete more than one line at once?
I need to add a field in FCC in receiver channel for csv along with the incoming array from Source
entry.content:
The problem is data from source has field and an array .SO when mapping to FCC in receiver channel for creating CSV,the one field mapped is coming only once but the array lines are coming multiple times

 

WH_NO|IBD|ITEM_NO|BATCH|SKU|QUANTITY|MFG_DATE|EXPIRY_DATE|STOR_TYPE|STOR_SEC|BIN|SUG
0390657434
|1||BNTFR100-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|2||BNTFR200-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M

I need below.0390657434 is not coming in array but outside array

WH_NO|IBD|ITEM_NO|BATCH|SKU|QUANTITY|MFG_DATE|EXPIRY_DATE|STOR_TYPE|STOR_SEC|BIN|SUG
|0390657434|1||BNTFR100-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|0390657434|2||BNTFR200-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|0390657434|3||BNTFR100-81|820|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M

entry.title: SAC Optimized Story - Export to Csv / Xlsx - Script Error
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working with an Optimized Story in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) where I have created a button with a script to export table data to a CSV/Xlsx file. When I attempt to export the table using the button in our current tenant, I receive the following error message:

However, when I try the exact same export in another tenant, it works without any issues. Both tenants are using import data. Does anyone know the possible reason for this discrepancy?

Thank you for your assistance.
